creator: ddrinnon@cdor.net
text:
net/chrony fails to build on Poudriere during the Package phase:

=======================<phase: package        >============================
===== env: 'PKG_NOTES=build_timestamp port_git_hash port_checkout_unclean built_by' 'PKG_NOTE_build_timestamp=2024-05-02T14:24:55+0000' 'PKG_NOTE_port_git_hash=0f298ec' 'PKG_NOTE_port_checkout_unclean=no' 'PKG_NOTE_built_by=poudriere-git-3.4.99.20240122' NO_DEPENDS=yes USER=root UID=0 GID=0
===>  Building packages for chrony-4.3
===>   Building chrony-4.3
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/chrony/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/chronyc.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/chrony/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/chrony.conf.5.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/chrony/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/chronyd.8.gz:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/chrony
